body: This PR will consider changing the active_map from Array{Tuple} to Tuple{Array, Array}.
title: Clean up of active map utils

body:
needed for running global simulations with an RK3 timestepper and a ZStar vertical coordinate.

For a hydrostatic model, we save the scaled tracer instead of the tracer and unscale it later once it has been evolved.

I am not 100% sure this is exactly correct, because it seems like there is a (very small) positive drift in integrated tracer.
However, I d like to merge so that we can do some more in-depth testing in ClimaOcean
title: Add support for ZStar in RK3
